carryForward.text: Consider a runtime configuration mechanism for the unsupported-languages list so new languages can be added without code changes.
Monitor whether the unsupported count banner drives user action (language migration) or just noise; may warrant an analytics hook.
Wire the new GradeNA constant and Unsupported field into the certification evaluation logic so the N/A short-circuit path is actually exercised at runtime.
Audit other domain types that may need corresponding Unsupported / N/A sentinel values for completeness.
Integrate language_tiers into downstream packages that currently hard-code or duplicate tier/language logic.
Consider adding benchmark tests if TierForLanguage or capability checks end up on hot paths.
